metadata.significance: Stories of multiple prophets, emphasizes sacrifice of Abraham

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلصَّـٰٓفَّـٰتِ صَفًّا

translations.en_sahih: By those [angels] lined up in rows
translations.en_yusufali: By those who range themselves in ranks,
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi (hamba-hambaKu) yang berbaris dengan berderet-deret -

translations.en_sahih: And those who drive [the clouds]
translations.en_yusufali: And so are strong in repelling (evil),
translations.ms_basmeih: (Hamba-hambaKu) yang melarang (dari kejahatan) dengan sesungguh-sungguhnya -

translations.en_sahih: And those who recite the message,
translations.en_yusufali: And thus proclaim the Message (of Allah)!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Hamba-hambaKu) yang membaca kandungan Kitab Suci;

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, your God is One,
translations.en_yusufali: Verily, verily, your Allah is one!-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sumpah demi sumpah) sesungguhnya Tuhan kamu hanyalah Satu -

ayahs.arabic: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma warabbu almashariqi

translations.en_sahih: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them and Lord of the sunrises.
translations.en_yusufali: Lord of the heavens and of the earth and all between them, and Lord of every point at the rising of the sun!
translations.ms_basmeih: Tuhan (yang mencipta serta mentadbirkan) langit dan bumi dan segala yang ada di antara keduanya, dan Tuhan (yang mengatur) tempat-tempat terbit matahari.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِزِينَةٍ ٱلْكَوَاكِبِ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna zayyanna alssamaa alddunya bizeenatin alkawakibi

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We have adorned the nearest heaven with an adornment of stars
translations.en_yusufali: We have indeed decked the lower heaven with beauty (in) the stars,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami telah menghiasi langit yang dekat (pada penglihatan penduduk bumi) dengan hiasan bintang-bintang.

translations.en_sahih: And as protection against every rebellious devil
translations.en_yusufali: (For beauty) and for guard against all obstinate rebellious evil spirits,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (Kami pelihara urusan langit itu) dengan serapi-rapi kawalan dari (masuk campur) tiap-tiap Syaitan yang derhaka;

ayahs.arabic: لَّا يَسَّمَّعُونَ إِلَى ٱلْمَلَإِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ وَيُقْذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٍ
ayahs.transliteration: La yassammaAAoona ila almalai alaAAla wayuqthafoona min kulli janibin

translations.en_sahih: [So] they may not listen to the exalted assembly [of angels] and are pelted from every side,
translations.en_yusufali: (So) they should not strain their ears in the direction of the Exalted Assembly but be cast away from every side,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Dengan itu) mereka tidak dapat memasang telinga mendengar (percakapan malaikat) penduduk langit, dan mereka pula direjam (dengan api) dari segala arah dan penjuru,

translations.en_sahih: Repelled; and for them is a constant punishment,
translations.en_yusufali: Repulsed, for they are under a perpetual penalty,
translations.ms_basmeih: Untuk mengusir mereka; dan mereka pula beroleh azab seksa yang tidak putus-putus.

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا مَنْ خَطِفَ ٱلْخَطْفَةَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌ ثَاقِبٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa man khatifa alkhatfata faatbaAAahu shihabun thaqibun

translations.en_sahih: Except one who snatches [some words] by theft, but they are pursued by a burning flame, piercing [in brightness].
translations.en_yusufali: Except such as snatch away something by stealth, and they are pursued by a flaming fire, of piercing brightness.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali sesiapa di antara Syaitan-syaitan itu yang curi mendengar mana-mana percakapan (malaikat), maka ia diburu dan diikuti (dengan rejaman) api yang menjulang lagi menembusi.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱسْتَفْتِهِمْ أَهُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَم مَّنْ خَلَقْنَآ ۚ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُم مِّن طِينٍ لَّازِبٍۭ
ayahs.transliteration: Faistaftihim ahum ashaddu khalqan am man khalaqna inna khalaqnahum min teenin lazibin

translations.en_sahih: Then inquire of them, [O Muhammad], "Are they a stronger [or more difficult] creation or those [others] We have created?" Indeed, We created men from sticky clay.
translations.en_yusufali: Just ask their opinion: are they the more difficult to create, or the (other) beings We have created? Them have We created out of a sticky clay!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah nyata kekuasaan Kami) maka bertanyalah (wahai Muhammad) kepada mereka (yang ingkarkan hidupnya semula orang-orang mati): Adakah diri mereka lebih sukar hendak diciptakan, atau makhluk-makhluk lain yang Kami telah ciptakan? Sesungguhnya Kami telah mencipta mereka dari tanah liat (yang senang diubah dan diciptakan semula).

translations.en_sahih: But you wonder, while they mock,
translations.en_yusufali: Truly dost thou marvel, while they ridicule,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Pertanyaan itu tidak juga berfaedah kepada mereka) bahkan engkau merasa hairan (terhadap keingkaran mereka), dan sebaliknya mereka mengejek-ejek (peneranganmu).

translations.en_sahih: And when they are reminded, they remember not.
translations.en_yusufali: And, when they are admonished, pay no heed,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila diperingatkan, mereka tetap tidak mahu menerima peringatan itu.

translations.en_sahih: And when they see a sign, they ridicule
translations.en_yusufali: And, when they see a Sign, turn it to mockery,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila mereka melihat sesuatu tanda (yang membuktikan kekuasaan Kami dan kebenaranmu), mereka mencari-cari jalan memperolok-olokkannya, -

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqaloo in hatha illa sihrun mubeenun

translations.en_sahih: And say, "This is not but obvious magic.
translations.en_yusufali: And say, "This is nothing but evident sorcery!
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta mereka berkata: "Ini tidak lain hanyalah sihir yang nyata.

ayahs.arabic: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Aitha mitna wakunna turaban waAAithaman ainna lamabAAoothoona

translations.en_sahih: When we have died and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
translations.en_yusufali: "What! when we die, and become dust and bones, shall we (then) be raised up (again)
translations.ms_basmeih: "Adakah sesudah kita mati serta menjadi tanah dan tulang, adakah kita akan dibangkitkan hidup semula?

translations.en_sahih: And our forefathers [as well]?"
translations.en_yusufali: "And also our fathers of old?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan adakah juga datuk nenek kita yang telah lalu (akan dibangkitkan hidup semula)?"

translations.en_sahih: Say, "Yes, and you will be [rendered] contemptible."
translations.en_yusufali: Say thou: "Yea, and ye shall then be humiliated (on account of your evil)."
translations.ms_basmeih: Jawablah (wahai Muhammad): "Ya, benar !(Kamu semua akan dibangkitkan) dengan keadaan hina-dina ".

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ فَإِذَا هُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fainnama hiya zajratun wahidatun faitha hum yanthuroona

translations.en_sahih: It will be only one shout, and at once they will be observing.
translations.en_yusufali: Then it will be a single (compelling) cry; and behold, they will begin to see!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kebangkitan ini mudah) kerana sesungguhnya ia boleh berlaku hanyalah dengan suara sahaja, maka dengan serta mereka semuanya (bangkit) melihat (apa yang akan jadi).

ayahs.transliteration: Waqaloo ya waylana hatha yawmu alddeeni

translations.en_sahih: They will say, "O woe to us! This is the Day of Recompense."
translations.en_yusufali: They will say, "Ah! Woe to us! This is the Day of Judgment!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (pada saat itu) mereka berkata:" Wahai celakanya kami, ini ialah hari balasan!"

ayahs.arabic: هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hatha yawmu alfasli allathee kuntum bihi tukaththiboona

translations.en_sahih: [They will be told], "This is the Day of Judgement which you used to deny."
translations.en_yusufali: (A voice will say,) "This is the Day of Sorting Out, whose truth ye (once) denied!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Lalu malaikat berkata kepada mereka): " Ini ialah hari memutuskan hukum untuk memberi balasan yang dahulu kamu mendustakannya ".

ayahs.arabic: ۞ ٱحْشُرُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ وَأَزْوَٰجَهُمْ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْبُدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ohshuroo allatheena thalamoo waazwajahum wama kanoo yaAAbudoona

translations.en_sahih: [The angels will be ordered], "Gather those who committed wrong, their kinds, and what they used to worship
translations.en_yusufali: "Bring ye up", it shall be said, "The wrong-doers and their wives, and the things they worshipped-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Allah berfirman kepada malaikat):" Himpunkanlah orang-orang yang zalim itu, dan orang-orang yang berkeadaan seperti mereka, serta benda-benda yang mereka sembah -

ayahs.arabic: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ فَٱهْدُوهُمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Min dooni Allahi faihdoohum ila sirati aljaheemi

translations.en_sahih: Other than Allah, and guide them to the path of Hellfire
translations.en_yusufali: "Besides Allah, and lead them to the Way to the (Fierce) Fire!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Yang lain dari Allah serta hadapkanlah mereka ke jalan yang membawa ke neraka.

translations.en_sahih: And stop them; indeed, they are to be questioned."
translations.en_yusufali: "But stop them, for they must be asked:
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan hentikanlah mereka (menunggu), kerana sesungguhnya mereka akan disoal:

translations.en_sahih: [They will be asked], "What is [wrong] with you? Why do you not help each other?"
translations.en_yusufali: "'What is the matter with you that ye help not each other?'"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Mengapa kamu tidak bertolong-tolongan (sebagaimana yang kamu dakwakan dahulu?"

translations.en_sahih: But they, that Day, are in surrender.
translations.en_yusufali: Nay, but that day they shall submit (to Judgment);
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mereka pada ketika itu tidak dapat berbuat apa-apa) bahkan mereka pada hari itu menyerah diri dengan hina (untuk diadili);

translations.en_sahih: And they will approach one another blaming each other.
translations.en_yusufali: And they will turn to one another, and question one another.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan masing-masing pun mengadap satu sama lain, sambil kata mengata dan cela mencela.

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَأْتُونَنَا عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo innakum kuntum tatoonana AAani alyameeni

translations.en_sahih: They will say, "Indeed, you used to come at us from the right."
translations.en_yusufali: They will say: "It was ye who used to come to us from the right hand (of power and authority)!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Pengikut-pengikut berkata (kepada ketuanya):" Sesungguhnya kamu dahulu selalu datang menyekat kami (daripada beriman) dengan menggunakan kuasa kamu".

translations.en_sahih: The oppressors will say, "Rather, you [yourselves] were not believers,
translations.en_yusufali: They will reply: "Nay, ye yourselves had no Faith!
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketua-ketuanya menjawab: " (Tidak!) Bahkan kamulah sendiri tidak mahu menjadi orang-orang yang beriman!

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا عَلَيْكُم مِّن سُلْطَـٰنٍۭ ۖ بَلْ كُنتُمْ قَوْمًا طَـٰغِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama kana lana AAalaykum min sultanin bal kuntum qawman tagheena

translations.en_sahih: And we had over you no authority, but you were a transgressing people.
translations.en_yusufali: "Nor had we any authority over you. Nay, it was ye who were a people in obstinate rebellion!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan kami (selain daripada mengajak kamu (tidak mempunyai sebarang kuasa memerintah kamu, bahkan kamu sememangnya kaum yang melampaui batas.

ayahs.arabic: فَحَقَّ عَلَيْنَا قَوْلُ رَبِّنَآ ۖ إِنَّا لَذَآئِقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fahaqqa AAalayna qawlu rabbina inna lathaiqoona

translations.en_sahih: So the word of our Lord has come into effect upon us; indeed, we will taste [punishment].
translations.en_yusufali: "So now has been proved true, against us, the word of our Lord that we shall indeed (have to) taste (the punishment of our sins).
translations.ms_basmeih: (Dengan keadaan diri kita yang sedemikian) maka tetaplah di atas kita janji seksa (yang dijanjikan) oleh Tuhan kita, bahawa kita semua tentu akan merasai (azab itu).

translations.en_sahih: And we led you to deviation; indeed, we were deviators."
translations.en_yusufali: "We led you astray: for truly we were ourselves astray."
translations.ms_basmeih: "(Dengan sebab ketentuan yang tersebut) maka kami pun mengajak kamu menjadi sesat, kerana sebenarnya kami adalah orang-orang sesat"

translations.en_sahih: So indeed they, that Day, will be sharing in the punishment.
translations.en_yusufali: Truly, that Day, they will (all) share in the Penalty.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka sesungguhnya mereka semua pada hari itu, menderita azab bersama.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, that is how We deal with the criminals.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily that is how We shall deal with Sinners.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya demikianlah Kami melakukan kepada orang-orang yang berdosa.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوٓا۟ إِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Innahum kanoo itha qeela lahum la ilaha illa Allahu yastakbiroona

translations.en_sahih: Indeed they, when it was said to them, "There is no deity but Allah," were arrogant
translations.en_yusufali: For they, when they were told that there is no god except Allah, would puff themselves up with Pride,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sebenarnya mereka dahulu apabila dikatakan kepadanya;" (ketahuilah, bahawa) tiada Tuhan yang sebenar-benarnya melainkan Allah" - mereka bersikap takbur mengingkarinya, -

ayahs.arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوٓا۟ ءَالِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرٍ مَّجْنُونٍۭ
ayahs.transliteration: Wayaqooloona ainna latarikoo alihatina lishaAAirin majnoonin

translations.en_sahih: And were saying, "Are we to leave our gods for a mad poet?"
translations.en_yusufali: And say: "What! shall we give up our gods for the sake of a Poet possessed?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta mereka berkata: " Patutkah kami mesti meninggalkan tuhan-tuhan yang kami sembah, kerana mendengar ajakan seorang penyair gila?"

translations.en_sahih: Rather, the Prophet has come with the truth and confirmed the [previous] messengers.
translations.en_yusufali: Nay! he has come with the (very) Truth, and he confirms (the Message of) the messengers (before him).
translations.ms_basmeih: (Tidak! Nabi Muhammad bukan penyair dan bukan pula seorang gila) bahkan ia telah membawa kebenaran (tauhid), dan mengesahkan kebenaran (tauhid) yang dibawa oleh Rasul-rasul (yang terdahulu daripadanya).

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, you [disbelievers] will be tasters of the painful punishment,
translations.en_yusufali: Ye shall indeed taste of the Grievous Penalty;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya kamu (wahai orang-orang musyrik) akan merasai azab seksa yang tidak terperi sakitnya.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama tujzawna illa ma kuntum taAAmaloona

translations.en_sahih: And you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do -
translations.en_yusufali: But it will be no more than the retribution of (the Evil) that ye have wrought;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kamu tidak dibalas melainkan (dengan balasan yang sepadan) dengan apa yang kamu telah kerjakan;

translations.en_sahih: But not the chosen servants of Allah.
translations.en_yusufali: But the sincere (and devoted) Servants of Allah,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali hamba-hamba Allah yang dibersihkan dari sebarang syirik,

translations.en_sahih: Those will have a provision determined -
translations.en_yusufali: For them is a Sustenance determined,
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka itu beroleh limpah kurnia yang termaklum,

translations.en_sahih: Fruits; and they will be honored
translations.en_yusufali: Fruits (Delights); and they (shall enjoy) honour and dignity,
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu buah-buahan (yang lazat), serta mereka mendapat penghormatan,

translations.en_sahih: In gardens of pleasure
translations.en_yusufali: In Gardens of Felicity,
translations.ms_basmeih: Di dalam syurga-syurga yang penuh melimpah dengan berjenis-jenis nikmat.

translations.en_sahih: On thrones facing one another.
translations.en_yusufali: Facing each other on Thrones (of Dignity):
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka duduk berhadap-hadapan di atas pelamin-pelamin kebesaran;

translations.en_sahih: There will be circulated among them a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring,
translations.en_yusufali: Round will be passed to them a Cup from a clear-flowing fountain,
translations.ms_basmeih: Diedarkan kepada mereka piala yang berisi arak (yang diambil) dari sungainya yang mengalir,

translations.en_sahih: White and delicious to the drinkers;
translations.en_yusufali: Crystal-white, of a taste delicious to those who drink (thereof),
translations.ms_basmeih: Minuman itu putih bersih, lagi lazat rasanya, bagi orang-orang yang meminumnya,

ayahs.arabic: لَا فِيهَا غَوْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ عَنْهَا يُنزَفُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: La feeha ghawlun wala hum AAanha yunzafoona

translations.en_sahih: No bad effect is there in it, nor from it will they be intoxicated.
translations.en_yusufali: Free from headiness; nor will they suffer intoxication therefrom.
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia tidak mengandungi sesuatu yang membahayakan, dan tidak pula mereka mabuk kerana menikmatinya.

translations.en_sahih: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances, with large, [beautiful] eyes,
translations.en_yusufali: And besides them will be chaste women, restraining their glances, with big eyes (of wonder and beauty).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sedang di sisi mereka ada pula bidadari-bidadari yang tidak menumpukan pandangannya melainkan kepada mereka, lagi yang amat indah luas matanya;

translations.en_sahih: As if they were [delicate] eggs, well-protected.
translations.en_yusufali: As if they were (delicate) eggs closely guarded.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Putih kekuning-kuningan) seolah-olah mereka telur (burung kasuari) yang tersimpan dengan sebaik-baiknya.

translations.en_sahih: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other.
translations.en_yusufali: Then they will turn to one another and question one another.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Tinggalah penduduk Syurga itu menikmati kesenangan), lalu setengahnya mengadap yang lain, sambil berbincang dan bertanya-tanyaan.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ قَآئِلٌ مِّنْهُمْ إِنِّى كَانَ لِى قَرِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala qailun minhum innee kana lee qareenun

translations.en_sahih: A speaker among them will say, "Indeed, I had a companion [on earth]
translations.en_yusufali: One of them will start the talk and say: "I had an intimate companion (on the earth),
translations.ms_basmeih: Seorang di antaranya berkata: " Sesungguhnya aku (di dunia) dahulu, ada seorang rakan (yang menempelak daku).

translations.en_sahih: Who would say, 'Are you indeed of those who believe
translations.en_yusufali: "Who used to say, 'what! art thou amongst those who bear witness to the Truth (of the Message)?
translations.ms_basmeih: "katanya: Adakah engkau juga salah seorang dari golongan yang mengakui benarnya (kebangkitan orang-orang mati pada hari akhirat)?

ayahs.arabic: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Aitha mitna wakunna turaban waAAithaman ainna lamadeenoona

translations.en_sahih: That when we have died and become dust and bones, we will indeed be recompensed?'"
translations.en_yusufali: "'When we die and become dust and bones, shall we indeed receive rewards and punishments?'"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Adakah sesudah kita mati dan menjadi tanah dan tulang, adakah kita akan (dihidupkan semula serta) dibalas apa yang telah kita lakukan? " '

translations.en_sahih: He will say, "Would you [care to] look?"
translations.en_yusufali: (A voice) said: "Would ye like to look down?"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah menceritakan perihal rakannya itu) ia berkata lagi: " Adakah kamu hendak melihat (keadaan rakanku yang ingkar itu)?"

translations.en_sahih: And he will look and see him in the midst of the Hellfire.
translations.en_yusufali: He looked down and saw him in the midst of the Fire.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka ia pun memandang (ke arah neraka), lalu dilihatnya rakannya itu berada ditengah-tengah neraka yang menjulang-julang.

translations.en_sahih: He will say, "By Allah, you almost ruined me.
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "By Allah! thou wast little short of bringing me to perdition!
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia pun (menempelaknya dengan) berkata:" Demi Allah! Nyaris-nyaris engkau menceburkan daku dalam kebinasaan.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَوْلَا نِعْمَةُ رَبِّى لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلْمُحْضَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walawla niAAmatu rabbee lakuntu mina almuhdareena

translations.en_sahih: If not for the favor of my Lord, I would have been of those brought in [to Hell].
translations.en_yusufali: "Had it not been for the Grace of my Lord, I should certainly have been among those brought (there)!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan kalaulah tidak disebabkan nikmat pemberian Tuhanku (dengan hidayah petunjuk), nescaya akan menjadilah daku dari orang-orang yang dibawa hadir (untuk menerima balasan azab) ".

translations.en_sahih: Then, are we not to die
translations.en_yusufali: "Is it (the case) that we shall not die,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kemudian ia berkata kepada rakan-rakanya yang sedang menikmati kesenangan di Syurga bersama): " Bukankah kita (setelah mendapat nikmat-nikmat ini) tidak akan mati lagi, -

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا مَوْتَتَنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa mawtatana aloola wama nahnu bimuAAaththabeena

translations.en_sahih: Except for our first death, and we will not be punished?"
translations.en_yusufali: "Except our first death, and that we shall not be punished?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Selain dari kematian kita yang dahulu, dan kita juga tidak akan terkena seksa?"

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, this is the great attainment.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily this is the supreme achievement!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya (nikmat-nikmat kesenangan Syurga) yang demikian, ialah sebenar-benar pendapatan dan kemenangan yang besar.

translations.en_sahih: For the like of this let the workers [on earth] work.
translations.en_yusufali: For the like of this let all strive, who wish to strive.
translations.ms_basmeih: Untuk memperoleh (kejayaan) yang seperti inilah hendaknya orang-orang yang beramal melakukan amal usahanya dengan bersungguh-sungguh (di dunia).

ayahs.arabic: أَذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ نُّزُلًا أَمْ شَجَرَةُ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
ayahs.transliteration: Athalika khayrun nuzulan am shajaratu alzzaqqoomi

translations.en_sahih: Is Paradise a better accommodation or the tree of zaqqum?
translations.en_yusufali: Is that the better entertainment or the Tree of Zaqqum?
translations.ms_basmeih: Manakah yang lebih baik, limpah kurniaan yang termaklum itu atau pokok zaqqum?

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We have made it a torment for the wrongdoers.
translations.en_yusufali: For We have truly made it (as) a trial for the wrong-doers.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami jadikan pokok zaqqum itu satu ujian bagi orang-orang yang zalim (di dunia dan azab seksa bagi mereka di akhirat).

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٌ تَخْرُجُ فِىٓ أَصْلِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Innaha shajaratun takhruju fee asli aljaheemi

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, it is a tree issuing from the bottom of the Hellfire,
translations.en_yusufali: For it is a tree that springs out of the bottom of Hell-Fire:
translations.ms_basmeih: Sebenarnya ia sebatang pohon yang tumbuh di dasar neraka yang marak menjulang;

translations.en_sahih: Its emerging fruit as if it was heads of the devils.
translations.en_yusufali: The shoots of its fruit-stalks are like the heads of devils:
translations.ms_basmeih: Buahnya seolah-olah kepala Syaitan-syaitan;

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنَّهُمْ لَـَٔاكِلُونَ مِنْهَا فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fainnahum laakiloona minha famalioona minha albutoona

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, they will eat from it and fill with it their bellies.
translations.en_yusufali: Truly they will eat thereof and fill their bellies therewith.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka sudah tentu mereka akan makan dari buahnya (sekalipun pahit dan busuk), sehingga mereka memenuhi perut darinya.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّ لَهُمْ عَلَيْهَا لَشَوْبًا مِّنْ حَمِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma inna lahum AAalayha lashawban min hameemin

translations.en_sahih: Then indeed, they will have after it a mixture of scalding water.
translations.en_yusufali: Then on top of that they will be given a mixture made of boiling water.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian, sesungguhnya mereka akan beroleh lagi - selain itu- satu minuman campuran dari air panas yang menggelegak.

translations.en_sahih: Then indeed, their return will be to the Hellfire.
translations.en_yusufali: Then shall their return be to the (Blazing) Fire.
translations.ms_basmeih: Setelah (mereka dibawa minum) maka tempat kembali mereka tetaplah ke dalam neraka yang menjulang-julang.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed they found their fathers astray.
translations.en_yusufali: Truly they found their fathers on the wrong Path;
translations.ms_basmeih: Sebenarnya mereka telah mendapati datuk nenek mereka berada dalam kesesatan;

translations.en_sahih: So they hastened [to follow] in their footsteps.
translations.en_yusufali: So they (too) were rushed down on their footsteps!
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu mereka terburu-buru menurut jejak langkah datuk neneknya.

translations.en_sahih: And there had already strayed before them most of the former peoples,
translations.en_yusufali: And truly before them, many of the ancients went astray;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya, telah sesat juga - sebelum kaummu (wahai Muhammad) - kebanyakan kaum-kaum yang telah lalu.

translations.en_sahih: And We had already sent among them warners.
translations.en_yusufali: But We sent aforetime, among them, (messengers) to admonish them;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada hal, demi sesungguhnya, Kami telahpun mengutus dalam kalangan kaum-kaum itu, Rasul-rasul pemberi amaran.

translations.en_sahih: Then look how was the end of those who were warned -
translations.en_yusufali: Then see what was the end of those who were admonished (but heeded not),-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka lihatlah bagaimana kesudahan orang-orang (yang mendustakan Rasul-rasul Kami) setelah diberi amaran, -

translations.en_sahih: But not the chosen servants of Allah.
translations.en_yusufali: Except the sincere (and devoted) Servants of Allah.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali hamba-hamba Allah yang dibersihkan dari sebarang syirik (maka mereka akan terselamat dan mendapat sebaik-baik balasan).

translations.en_sahih: And Noah had certainly called Us, and [We are] the best of responders.
translations.en_yusufali: (In the days of old), Noah cried to Us, and We are the best to hear prayer.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya, Nabi Nuh telah berdoa merayu kepada Kami (memohon pertolongan), maka Kami adalah sebaik-baik yang kabulkan doa permohonan.

translations.en_sahih: And We saved him and his family from the great affliction.
translations.en_yusufali: And We delivered him and his people from the Great Calamity,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami telah selamatkan dia bersama-sama dengan keluarga dan pengikut-pengikutnya, dari kesusahan yang besar.

translations.en_sahih: And We made his descendants those remaining [on the earth]
translations.en_yusufali: And made his progeny to endure (on this earth);
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami jadikan zuriat keturunannya sahaja orang-orang yang tinggal hidup (setelah Kami binasakan kaumnya yang ingkar).

translations.en_sahih: And left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:
translations.en_yusufali: And We left (this blessing) for him among generations to come in later times:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami kekalkan baginya (nama yang harum) dalam kalangan orang-orang yang datang kemudian:

translations.en_sahih: "Peace upon Noah among the worlds."
translations.en_yusufali: "Peace and salutation to Noah among the nations!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Salam sejahtera kepada Nabi Nuh dalam kalangan penduduk seluruh alam ! "

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
translations.en_yusufali: Thus indeed do we reward those who do right.
translations.ms_basmeih: Demikianlah sebenarnya Kami membalas orang-orang yang berusaha mengerjakan amal-amal yang baik.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.
translations.en_yusufali: For he was one of our believing Servants.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Nabi Nuh itu dari hamba-hamba Kami yang beriman.

translations.en_sahih: Then We drowned the disbelievers.
translations.en_yusufali: Then the rest we overwhelmed in the Flood.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Kami tenggelamkan golongan yang lain (yang mendustakannya).

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, among his kind was Abraham,
translations.en_yusufali: Verily among those who followed his Way was Abraham.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya di antara orang-orang yang menegakkan (ajaran yang dibawa oleh) Nabi Nuh ialah Nabi Ibrahim.

translations.en_sahih: When he came to his Lord with a sound heart
translations.en_yusufali: Behold! he approached his Lord with a sound heart.
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika ia mematuhi perintah tuhannya dengan hati yang suci murni.

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَاذَا تَعْبُدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala liabeehi waqawmihi matha taAAbudoona

translations.en_sahih: [And] when he said to his father and his people, "What do you worship?
translations.en_yusufali: Behold! he said to his father and to his people, "What is that which ye worship?
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika ia berkata kepada bapanya dan kaumnya: " Apa yang kamu sembah?

translations.en_sahih: Is it falsehood [as] gods other than Allah you desire?
translations.en_yusufali: "Is it a falsehood- gods other than Allah- that ye desire?
translations.ms_basmeih: "Patutkah kamu menyembah tuhan-tuhan yang lain dari Allah, kerana kamu memutar belitkan kebenaran semata-mata (bukan kerana benarnya)?

translations.en_sahih: Then what is your thought about the Lord of the worlds?"
translations.en_yusufali: "Then what is your idea about the Lord of the worlds?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Maka bagaimana fikiran kamu pula terhadap Allah Tuhan sekalian alam?"

translations.en_sahih: And he cast a look at the stars
translations.en_yusufali: Then did he cast a glance at the Stars.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian ia memandang dengan satu renungan kepada bintang-bintang (yang bertaburan di langit),

translations.en_sahih: And said, "Indeed, I am [about to be] ill."
translations.en_yusufali: And he said, "I am indeed sick (at heart)!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu berkata: "Sesungguhnya aku merasa sakit (tak dapat turut berhari raya sama)".

translations.en_sahih: So they turned away from him, departing.
translations.en_yusufali: So they turned away from him, and departed.
translations.ms_basmeih: Setelah (mendengar kata-katanya) itu, mereka berpaling meninggalkan dia.

ayahs.arabic: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِهِمْ فَقَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faragha ila alihatihim faqala ala takuloona

translations.en_sahih: Then he turned to their gods and said, "Do you not eat?
translations.en_yusufali: Then did he turn to their gods and said, "will ye not eat (of the offerings before you)?...
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu ia pergi kepada berhala-berhala mereka secara bersembunyi, serta ia bertanya (kepada berhala-berhala itu, secara mengejek-ejek): "Mengapa kamu tidak makan?

translations.en_sahih: What is [wrong] with you that you do not speak?"
translations.en_yusufali: "What is the matter with you that ye speak not (intelligently)?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Mengapa kamu tidak menjawab?"

translations.en_sahih: And he turned upon them a blow with [his] right hand.
translations.en_yusufali: Then did he turn upon them, striking (them) with the right hand.
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu ia memukul berhala-berhala itu dengan tangan kanannya (sehingga pecah berketul-ketul).

translations.en_sahih: Then the people came toward him, hastening.
translations.en_yusufali: Then came (the worshippers) with hurried steps, and faced (him).
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah kaumnya mengetahui hal itu) maka datanglah mereka beramai-ramai kepadanya.

translations.en_sahih: He said, "Do you worship that which you [yourselves] carve,
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "Worship ye that which ye have (yourselves) carved?
translations.ms_basmeih: (Bagi menjawab bantahan mereka), ia berkata: "Patutkah kamu menyembah benda-benda yang kamu pahat?

translations.en_sahih: While Allah created you and that which you do?"
translations.en_yusufali: "But Allah has created you and your handwork!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Padahal Allah yang mencipta kamu dan benda-benda yang kamu buat itu!"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ ٱبْنُوا۟ لَهُۥ بُنْيَـٰنًا فَأَلْقُوهُ فِى ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo ibnoo lahu bunyanan faalqoohu fee aljaheemi

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Construct for him a furnace and throw him into the burning fire."
translations.en_yusufali: They said, "Build him a furnace, and throw him into the blazing fire!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah tak dapat berhujah lagi, ketua-ketua) mereka berkata: "Binalah untuk Ibrahim sebuah tempat (untuk membakarnya), kemudian campakkan dia ke dalam api yang menjulang-julang itu".

translations.en_sahih: And they intended for him a plan, but We made them the most debased.
translations.en_yusufali: (This failing), they then sought a stratagem against him, but We made them the ones most humiliated!
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka mereka (dengan perbuatan membakar Nabi Ibrahim itu) hendak melakukan angkara yang menyakitinya, lalu Kami jadikan mereka orang-orang yang terkebawah (yang tidak berjaya maksudnya).

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالَ إِنِّى ذَاهِبٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqala innee thahibun ila rabbee sayahdeeni

translations.en_sahih: And [then] he said, "Indeed, I will go to [where I am ordered by] my Lord; He will guide me.
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "I will go to my Lord! He will surely guide me!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Nabi Ibrahim pula berkata: "Aku hendak (meninggalkan kamu) pergi kepada Tuhanku, Ia akan memimpinku (ke jalan yang benar).

translations.en_sahih: My Lord, grant me [a child] from among the righteous."
translations.en_yusufali: "O my Lord! Grant me a righteous (son)!"
translations.ms_basmeih: " Wahai Tuhanku! Kurniakanlah kepadaku anak yang terhitung dari orang-orang yang soleh!"

translations.en_sahih: So We gave him good tidings of a forbearing boy.
translations.en_yusufali: So We gave him the good news of a boy ready to suffer and forbear.
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu Kami berikan kepadanya berita yang mengembirakan, bahawa ia akan beroleh seorang anak yang penyabar.

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ ٱلسَّعْىَ قَالَ يَـٰبُنَىَّ إِنِّىٓ أَرَىٰ فِى ٱلْمَنَامِ أَنِّىٓ أَذْبَحُكَ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا تَرَىٰ ۚ قَالَ يَـٰٓأَبَتِ ٱفْعَلْ مَا تُؤْمَرُ ۖ سَتَجِدُنِىٓ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Falamma balagha maAAahu alssaAAya qala ya bunayya innee ara fee almanami annee athbahuka faonthur matha tara qala ya abati ifAAal ma tumaru satajidunee in shaa Allahu mina alssabireena

translations.en_sahih: And when he reached with him [the age of] exertion, he said, "O my son, indeed I have seen in a dream that I [must] sacrifice you, so see what you think." He said, "O my father, do as you are commanded. You will find me, if Allah wills, of the steadfast."
translations.en_yusufali: Then, when (the son) reached (the age of) (serious) work with him, he said: "O my son! I see in vision that I offer thee in sacrifice: Now see what is thy view!" (The son) said: "O my father! Do as thou art commanded: thou will find me, if Allah so wills one practising Patience and Constancy!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka ketika anaknya itu sampai (ke peringkat umur yang membolehkan dia) berusaha bersama-sama dengannya, Nabi Ibrahim berkata: "Wahai anak kesayanganku! Sesungguhnya aku melihat dalam mimpi bahawa aku akan menyembelihmu; maka fikirkanlah apa pendapatmu?". Anaknya menjawab: "Wahai ayah, jalankanlah apa yang diperintahkan kepadamu; Insya Allah, ayah akan mendapati daku dari orang-orang yang sabar".

translations.en_sahih: And when they had both submitted and he put him down upon his forehead,
translations.en_yusufali: So when they had both submitted their wills (to Allah), and he had laid him prostrate on his forehead (for sacrifice),
translations.ms_basmeih: Setelah keduanya berserah bulat-bulat (menjunjung perintah Allah itu), dan Nabi Ibrahim merebahkan anaknya dengan meletakkan iringan mukanya di atas tompok tanah, (Kami sifatkan Ibrahim - dengan kesungguhan azamnya itu telah menjalankan perintah Kami),

translations.en_sahih: We called to him, "O Abraham,
translations.en_yusufali: We called out to him "O Abraham!
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta Kami menyerunya: "Wahai Ibrahim!

ayahs.arabic: قَدْ صَدَّقْتَ ٱلرُّءْيَآ ۚ إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qad saddaqta alrruya inna kathalika najzee almuhsineena

translations.en_sahih: You have fulfilled the vision." Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
translations.en_yusufali: "Thou hast already fulfilled the vision!" - thus indeed do We reward those who do right.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Engkau telah menyempurnakan maksud mimpi yang engkau lihat itu". Demikianlah sebenarnya Kami membalas orang-orang yang berusaha mengerjakan kebaikan.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, this was the clear trial.
translations.en_yusufali: For this was obviously a trial-
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya perintah ini adalah satu ujian yang nyata;

translations.en_sahih: And We ransomed him with a great sacrifice,
translations.en_yusufali: And We ransomed him with a momentous sacrifice:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami tebus anaknya itu dengan seekor binatang sembelihan yang besar;

translations.en_sahih: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:
translations.en_yusufali: And We left (this blessing) for him among generations (to come) in later times:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami kekalkan baginya (nama yang harum) dalam kalangan orang-orang yang datang kemudian:

translations.en_sahih: "Peace upon Abraham."
translations.en_yusufali: "Peace and salutation to Abraham!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Salam sejahtera kepada Nabi Ibrahim!".

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
translations.en_yusufali: Thus indeed do We reward those who do right.
translations.ms_basmeih: Demikianlah Kami membalas orang-orang yang berusaha mengerjakan kebaikan.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.
translations.en_yusufali: For he was one of our believing Servants.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Nabi Ibrahim itu dari hamba-hamba Kami yang beriman.

translations.en_sahih: And We gave him good tidings of Isaac, a prophet from among the righteous.
translations.en_yusufali: And We gave him the good news of Isaac - a prophet,- one of the Righteous.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami pula berikan kepadanya berita yang mengembirakan, bahawa ia akan beroleh (seorang anak): Ishak, yang akan menjadi Nabi, yang terhitung dari orang-orang yang soleh.

ayahs.arabic: وَبَـٰرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰٓ إِسْحَـٰقَ ۚ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا مُحْسِنٌ وَظَالِمٌ لِّنَفْسِهِۦ مُبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wabarakna AAalayhi waAAala ishaqa wamin thurriyyatihima muhsinun wathalimun linafsihi mubeenun

translations.en_sahih: And We blessed him and Isaac. But among their descendants is the doer of good and the clearly unjust to himself.
translations.en_yusufali: We blessed him and Isaac: but of their progeny are (some) that do right, and (some) that obviously do wrong, to their own souls.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami limpahi berkat kepadanya dan kepada (anaknya): Ishak; dan di antara zuriat keturunan keduanya ada yang mengerjakan kebaikan, dan ada pula yang berlaku zalim dengan nyata, terhadap dirinya sendiri.

translations.en_sahih: And We did certainly confer favor upon Moses and Aaron.
translations.en_yusufali: Again (of old) We bestowed Our favour on Moses and Aaron,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! kami telah melimpahkan nikmat pemberian kepada Nabi Musa dan Nabi Harun.

translations.en_sahih: And We saved them and their people from the great affliction,
translations.en_yusufali: And We delivered them and their people from (their) Great Calamity;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami selamatkan keduanya dan kaumnya dari kesusahan yang besar;

translations.en_sahih: And We supported them so it was they who overcame.
translations.en_yusufali: And We helped them, so they overcame (their troubles);
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami menolong mereka sehingga menjadilah mereka orang-orang yang berjaya mengalahkan (lawannya);

translations.en_sahih: And We gave them the explicit Scripture,
translations.en_yusufali: And We gave them the Book which helps to make things clear;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami berikan kepada keduanya Kitab Suci yang amat jelas keterangannya;

translations.en_sahih: And We guided them on the straight path.
translations.en_yusufali: And We guided them to the Straight Way.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami berikan hidayah petunjuk kepada keduanya ke jalan yang lurus.

translations.en_sahih: And We left for them [favorable mention] among later generations:
translations.en_yusufali: And We left (this blessing) for them among generations (to come) in later times:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami kekalkan bagi keduanya (nama yang harum) dalam kalangan orang-orang yang datang kemudian:

translations.en_sahih: "Peace upon Moses and Aaron."
translations.en_yusufali: "Peace and salutation to Moses and Aaron!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Salam sejahtera kepada Nabi Musa dan Nabi Harun!"

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
translations.en_yusufali: Thus indeed do We reward those who do right.
translations.ms_basmeih: Demikianlah sebenarnya Kami membalas orang-orang yang berusaha mengerjakan kebaikan.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, they were of Our believing servants.
translations.en_yusufali: For they were two of our believing Servants.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya mereka berdua adalah dari hamba-hamba Kami yang beriman.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, Elias was from among the messengers,
translations.en_yusufali: So also was Elias among those sent (by Us).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Nabi Ilyas adalah dari Rasul-rasul (Kami) yang diutus.

translations.en_sahih: When he said to his people, "Will you not fear Allah?
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, he said to his people, "Will ye not fear (Allah)?
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ingatkanlah peristiwa) ketika ia berkata kepada kaumnya: "Hendaklah kamu mematuhi suruhan Allah dan menjauhi laranganNya.

translations.en_sahih: Do you call upon Ba'l and leave the best of creators -
translations.en_yusufali: "Will ye call upon Baal and forsake the Best of Creators,-
translations.ms_basmeih: "Patutkah kamu menyembah berhala Ba'la, dan kamu meninggalkan (ibadat kepada) sebijak-bijak pencipta?

translations.en_sahih: Allah, your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers?"
translations.en_yusufali: "Allah, your Lord and Cherisher and the Lord and Cherisher of your fathers of old?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Iaitu Allah Tuhan kamu, dan Tuhan datuk nenek kamu yang telah lalu!"

translations.en_sahih: And they denied him, so indeed, they will be brought [for punishment],
translations.en_yusufali: But they rejected him, and they will certainly be called up (for punishment),-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka mereka mendustakannya; akibatnya mereka tetap akan dibawa hadir (untuk diseksa),

translations.en_sahih: Except the chosen servants of Allah.
translations.en_yusufali: Except the sincere and devoted Servants of Allah (among them).
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali hamba-hamba Allah yang dibersihkan dari sebarang syirik (maka mereka akan terselamat, dan mendapat sebaik-baik balasan).

translations.en_sahih: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:
translations.en_yusufali: And We left (this blessing) for him among generations (to come) in later times:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami kekalkan bagi Nabi Ilyas (nama yang harum) dalam kalangan orang-orang yang datang kemudian:

translations.en_sahih: "Peace upon Elias."
translations.en_yusufali: "Peace and salutation to such as Elias!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Salam sejahtera kepada Nabi Ilyas!"

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
translations.en_yusufali: Thus indeed do We reward those who do right.
translations.ms_basmeih: Demikianlah sebenarnya Kami membalas orang-orang yang berusaha mengerjakan kebaikan.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.
translations.en_yusufali: For he was one of our believing Servants.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Nabi Ilyas itu dari hamba-hamba Kami yang beriman.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, Lot was among the messengers.
translations.en_yusufali: So also was Lut among those sent (by Us).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Nabi Lut adalah dari Rasul-rasul (Kami) yang diutus.

translations.en_sahih: [So mention] when We saved him and his family, all,
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, We delivered him and his adherents, all
translations.ms_basmeih: (ingatkanlah peristiwa) ketika kami selamatkan dia dan keluarga serta pengikut-pengikutnya semuanya,

translations.en_sahih: Except his wife among those who remained [with the evildoers].
translations.en_yusufali: Except an old woman who was among those who lagged behind:
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali seorang perempuan tua tertinggal dalam golongan yang dibinasakan.

translations.en_sahih: Then We destroyed the others.
translations.en_yusufali: Then We destroyed the rest.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Kami hancurkan yang lain (dari pengikut-pengikut Nabi Lut).

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, you pass by them in the morning
translations.en_yusufali: Verily, ye pass by their (sites), by day-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya kamu (yang menentang Nabi Muhammad): berulang-alik (melalui bekas-bekas tempat tinggal) mereka, semasa kamu berada pada waktu pagi.

translations.en_sahih: And at night. Then will you not use reason?
translations.en_yusufali: And by night: will ye not understand?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan juga pada waktu malam; maka mengapa kamu tidak mahu memikirkannya?.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, Jonah was among the messengers.
translations.en_yusufali: So also was Jonah among those sent (by Us).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Nabi Yunus adalah dari Rasul-rasul (Kami) yang diutus.

translations.en_sahih: [Mention] when he ran away to the laden ship.
translations.en_yusufali: When he ran away (like a slave from captivity) to the ship (fully) laden,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ingatkanlah peristiwa) ketika ia melarikan diri ke kapal yang penuh sarat.

translations.en_sahih: And he drew lots and was among the losers.
translations.en_yusufali: He (agreed to) cast lots, and he was condemned:
translations.ms_basmeih: (Dengan satu keadaan yang memaksa) maka dia pun turut mengundi, lalu menjadilah ia dari orang-orang yang kalah yang digelunsurkan (ke laut).

translations.en_sahih: Then the fish swallowed him, while he was blameworthy.
translations.en_yusufali: Then the big Fish did swallow him, and he had done acts worthy of blame.
translations.ms_basmeih: Setelah itu ia ditelan oleh ikan besar, sedang ia berhak ditempelak.

translations.en_sahih: And had he not been of those who exalt Allah,
translations.en_yusufali: Had it not been that he (repented and) glorified Allah,
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka kalaulah ia bukan dari orang-orang yang sentiasa mengingati Allah (dengan zikir dan tasbih),

ayahs.arabic: لَلَبِثَ فِى بَطْنِهِۦٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Lalabitha fee batnihi ila yawmi yubAAathoona

translations.en_sahih: He would have remained inside its belly until the Day they are resurrected.
translations.en_yusufali: He would certainly have remained inside the Fish till the Day of Resurrection.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tentulah ia akan tinggal di dalam perut ikan itu hingga ke hari manusia dibangkitkan keluar dari kubur.

translations.en_sahih: But We threw him onto the open shore while he was ill.
translations.en_yusufali: But We cast him forth on the naked shore in a state of sickness,
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu Kami campakkan dia keluar (dari perut ikan) ke tanah yang tandus (di tepi pantai), sedang ia berkeadaan sakit.

translations.en_sahih: And We caused to grow over him a gourd vine.
translations.en_yusufali: And We caused to grow, over him, a spreading plant of the gourd kind.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami tumbuhkan (untuk melindunginya) sebatang pokok yang berdaun lebar.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَرْسَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ مِا۟ئَةِ أَلْفٍ أَوْ يَزِيدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waarsalnahu ila miati alfin aw yazeedoona

translations.en_sahih: And We sent him to [his people of] a hundred thousand or more.
translations.en_yusufali: And We sent him (on a mission) to a hundred thousand (men) or more.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (Nabi Yunus yang tersebut kisahnya itu) Kami utuskan kepada (kaumnya yang seramai) seratus ribu atau lebih.

translations.en_sahih: And they believed, so We gave them enjoyment [of life] for a time.
translations.en_yusufali: And they believed; so We permitted them to enjoy (their life) for a while.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah berlaku apa yang berlaku) maka mereka pun beriman, lalu Kami biarkan mereka menikmati kesenangan hidup hingga ke suatu masa (yang ditetapkan bagi masing-masing).

translations.en_sahih: So inquire of them, [O Muhammad], "Does your Lord have daughters while they have sons?
translations.en_yusufali: Now ask them their opinion: Is it that thy Lord has (only) daughters, and they have sons?-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Oleh sebab ada di antara kaum musyrik Arab yang mendakwa bahawa malaikat itu anak-anak perempuan Allah) maka bertanyalah (wahai Muhammad) kepada mereka itu: Adilkah mereka membahagi untuk Tuhanmu anak-anak perempuan, dan untuk mereka anak-anak lelaki?

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ إِنَـٰثًا وَهُمْ شَـٰهِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Am khalaqna almalaikata inathan wahum shahidoona

translations.en_sahih: Or did We create the angels as females while they were witnesses?"
translations.en_yusufali: Or that We created the angels female, and they are witnesses (thereto)?
translations.ms_basmeih: Atau adakah mereka hadir sendiri menyaksikan Kami mencipta malaikat-malaikat itu - perempuan?

translations.en_sahih: Unquestionably, it is out of their [invented] falsehood that they say,
translations.en_yusufali: Is it not that they say, from their own invention,
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketahuilah! Bahawa sesungguhnya, dengan sebab terpesongnya dari kebenaran, mereka berkata:

translations.en_sahih: " Allah has begotten," and indeed, they are liars.
translations.en_yusufali: "Allah has begotten children"? but they are liars!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Allah beranak"; sedang mereka, sesungguhnya adalah orang-orang yang berdusta!

translations.en_sahih: Has He chosen daughters over sons?
translations.en_yusufali: Did He (then) choose daughters rather than sons?
translations.ms_basmeih: (Patutkah kamu mendakwa bahawa Tuhan mempunyai anak, dan anak itu pula ialah anak-anak perempuan yang kamu tidak sukai?) Adakah Tuhan memilih serta mengutamakan anak-anak perempuan dari anak-anak lelaki (sedang kedua-dua jenis itu Dia lah yang menciptakannya)?

translations.en_sahih: What is [wrong] with you? How do you make judgement?
translations.en_yusufali: What is the matter with you? How judge ye?
translations.ms_basmeih: Apa sudah jadi kamu? Bagaimana kamu menetapkan hukum (yang terang-terang salahnya itu)?

translations.en_sahih: Then will you not be reminded?
translations.en_yusufali: Will ye not then receive admonition?
translations.ms_basmeih: Setelah ditegur, maka tidakkah kamu mahu berusaha mengingatkan (bahawa Allah mustahil bagiNya anak-pinak)?

translations.en_sahih: Or do you have a clear authority?
translations.en_yusufali: Or have ye an authority manifest?
translations.ms_basmeih: Atau adakah kamu mempunyai sebarang bukti yang nyata (menerangkan bahawa malaikat itu anak-anak perempuan Allah)?

translations.en_sahih: Then produce your scripture, if you should be truthful.
translations.en_yusufali: Then bring ye your Book (of authority) if ye be truthful!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kiranya ada) maka bawalah kitab kamu (yang menerangkan demikian), jika betul kamu orang-orang yang benar.

ayahs.arabic: وَجَعَلُوا۟ بَيْنَهُۥ وَبَيْنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ نَسَبًا ۚ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمَتِ ٱلْجِنَّةُ إِنَّهُمْ لَمُحْضَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: WajaAAaloo baynahu wabayna aljinnati nasaban walaqad AAalimati aljinnatu innahum lamuhdaroona

translations.en_sahih: And they have claimed between Him and the jinn a lineage, but the jinn have already known that they [who made such claims] will be brought to [punishment].
translations.en_yusufali: And they have invented a blood-relationship between Him and the Jinns: but the Jinns know (quite well) that they have indeed to appear (before his Judgment-Seat)!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mereka telah mengatakan perkara yang mustahil) serta mengadakan pertalian kerabat di antara Allah dan malaikat, padahal demi sesungguhnya malaikat itu sedia mengetahui bahawa sebenarnya orang-orang yang melakukan demikian akan dibawa hadir (ke dalam azab pada hari akhirat).

translations.en_sahih: Exalted is Allah above what they describe,
translations.en_yusufali: Glory to Allah! (He is free) from the things they ascribe (to Him)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Maha Suci Allah dari apa yang mereka katakan itu!

translations.en_sahih: Except the chosen servants of Allah [who do not share in that sin].
translations.en_yusufali: Not (so do) the Servants of Allah, sincere and devoted.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali hamba-hamba Allah yang dibersihkan dari sebarang syirik, (maka mereka akan terselamat, dan akan mendapat sebaik-baik balasan).

translations.en_sahih: So indeed, you [disbelievers] and whatever you worship,
translations.en_yusufali: For, verily, neither ye nor those ye worship-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka sebenarnya kamu (wahai orang-orang musyrik), dan apa yang kamu sembah itu.

translations.en_sahih: You cannot tempt [anyone] away from Him
translations.en_yusufali: Can lead (any) into temptation concerning Allah,
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidak akan dapat merosakkan perhubungan seseorang dengan Tuhannya,

translations.en_sahih: Except he who is to [enter and] burn in the Hellfire.
translations.en_yusufali: Except such as are (themselves) going to the blazing Fire!
translations.ms_basmeih: kecuali orang-orang yang telah ditetapkan bahawa dia akan dibakar di dalam neraka yang menjulang-julang.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا مِنَّآ إِلَّا لَهُۥ مَقَامٌ مَّعْلُومٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama minna illa lahu maqamun maAAloomun

translations.en_sahih: [The angels say], "There is not among us any except that he has a known position.
translations.en_yusufali: (Those ranged in ranks say): "Not one of us but has a place appointed;
translations.ms_basmeih: (Malaikat pula menegaskan pendirian mereka dengan berkata): "Dan tiada sesiapapun dari kalangan kami melainkan ada baginya darjat kedudukan yang tertentu (dalam menyempurnakan tugasnya);

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, we are those who line up [for prayer].
translations.en_yusufali: "And we are verily ranged in ranks (for service);
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan sesungguhnya kamilah yang sentiasa berbaris (menjunjung perintah dan beribadat),

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, we are those who exalt Allah."
translations.en_yusufali: "And we are verily those who declare (Allah's) glory!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan sesungguhnya kamilah yang sentiasa bertasbih (mensucikan Allah dari sebarang sifat kekurangan)!"

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, the disbelievers used to say,
translations.en_yusufali: And there were those who said,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sebenarnya mereka (yang musyrik) itu dahulu pernah berkata:

ayahs.arabic: لَوْ أَنَّ عِندَنَا ذِكْرًا مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Law anna AAindana thikran mina alawwaleena

translations.en_sahih: "If we had a message from [those of] the former peoples,
translations.en_yusufali: "If only we had had before us a Message from those of old,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Kalaulah ada di sisi kami Kitab Suci dari (bawaan Rasul-rasul) yang telah lalu

translations.en_sahih: We would have been the chosen servants of Allah."
translations.en_yusufali: "We should certainly have been Servants of Allah, sincere (and devoted)!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Tentulah kami akan menjadi hamba-hamba Allah yang dibersihkan dari sebarang syirik!"

translations.en_sahih: But they disbelieved in it, so they are going to know.
translations.en_yusufali: But (now that the Qur'an has come), they reject it: But soon will they know!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah Al-Quran diturunkan kepada mereka) mereka mengingkarinya; oleh itu mereka akan mengetahui kelak (akibat kekufurannya).

translations.en_sahih: And Our word has already preceded for Our servants, the messengers,
translations.en_yusufali: Already has Our Word been passed before (this) to our Servants sent (by Us),
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Telah ada semenjak dahulu lagi, ketetapan Kami, bagi hamba-hamba Kami yang diutus menjadi Rasul -

translations.en_sahih: [That] indeed, they would be those given victory
translations.en_yusufali: That they would certainly be assisted,
translations.ms_basmeih: Bahawa sesungguhnya merekalah orang-orang yang diberikan pertolongan mencapai kemenangan

translations.en_sahih: And [that] indeed, Our soldiers will be those who overcome.
translations.en_yusufali: And that Our forces,- they surely must conquer.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bahawasanya tentera Kami (pengikut-pengikut Rasul), merekalah orang-orang yang mengalahkan (golongan yang menentang kebenaran).

translations.en_sahih: So, [O Muhammad], leave them for a time.
translations.en_yusufali: So turn thou away from them for a little while,
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu berpalinglah (wahai Muhammad) dari mereka, (jangan hiraukan celaan mereka serta bersabarlah) hingga ke suatu masa.

translations.en_sahih: And see [what will befall] them, for they are going to see.
translations.en_yusufali: And watch them (how they fare), and they soon shall see (how thou farest)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan lihat (apa yang akan menimpa) mereka; tidak lama kemudian mereka akan melihat (kemenangan yang telah Kami tetapkan untukmu).

translations.en_sahih: Then for Our punishment are they impatient?
translations.en_yusufali: Do they wish (indeed) to hurry on our Punishment?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka tidaklah patut mereka meminta disegerakan azab (yang telah ditetapkan oleh) Kami!

ayahs.arabic: فَإِذَا نَزَلَ بِسَاحَتِهِمْ فَسَآءَ صَبَاحُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faitha nazala bisahatihim fasaa sabahu almunthareena

translations.en_sahih: But when it descends in their territory, then evil is the morning of those who were warned.
translations.en_yusufali: But when it descends into the open space before them, evil will be the morning for those who were warned (and heeded not)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kerana apabila azab itu turun dalam daerah dan kawasan mereka, sudah tentu buruklah hari orang-orang yang tidak mengindahkan amaran yang telah diberikan.

translations.en_sahih: And leave them for a time.
translations.en_yusufali: So turn thou away from them for a little while,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan berpalinglah (wahai Muhammad) dari mereka, (jangan hiraukan celaan mereka serta bersabarlah) hingga ke suatu masa.

translations.en_sahih: And see, for they are going to see.
translations.en_yusufali: And watch (how they fare) and they soon shall see (how thou farest)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan lihatlah (apa yang akan jadi); tidak lama kemudian, mereka pun akan melihat juga.

ayahs.arabic: سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Subhana rabbika rabbi alAAizzati AAamma yasifoona

translations.en_sahih: Exalted is your Lord, the Lord of might, above what they describe.
translations.en_yusufali: Glory to thy Lord, the Lord of Honour and Power! (He is free) from what they ascribe (to Him)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Akuilah kesucian Tuhanmu, - Tuhan yang mempunyai keagungan dan kekuasaan, - dari apa yang mereka katakan!

translations.en_sahih: And peace upon the messengers.
translations.en_yusufali: And Peace on the messengers!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (ucaplah) salam sejahtera kepada sekalian Rasul.

translations.en_sahih: And praise to Allah, Lord of the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: And Praise to Allah, the Lord and Cherisher of the Worlds.
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta (ingatlah bahawa) segala puji tertentu bagi Allah, Tuhan yang memelihara dan mentadbirkan seluruh alam.
